title: T-027 — UI: FA History tab + audit_events read-only timeline
prompt:
# T-027 — FA History tab UI

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §3.1 events list + UX fa_history_tab
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:921-950 (fa_history_tab)

## Goal
History tab rendering audit_events + outbox_events read-only timeline for the current FA: dept closes, built/reset transitions, allergen overrides, brief conversion.

## Implementation contract
New apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/_tabs/history-tab.tsx (RSC). Reads packages/queries listFaHistory(productCode) returning union of audit_events + outbox_events ordered DESC. Render shadcn Timeline pattern: Avatar + actor + dt + event_type Badge + payload summary.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/_tabs/history-tab.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/_tabs/__tests__/history-tab.test.tsx [create]
- packages/queries/src/list-fa-history.ts [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the tab renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:921-950 (fa_history_tab), then it shows the same timeline structure (avatar + actor + dt + event_type badge + summary), and uses shadcn Card+Avatar+Badge primitives — verified by RTL parity checklist (structural+visual+interaction)
2. Given fa with one fa.created and one fa.dept_closed event, when listFaHistory runs, then both rows appear ordered DESC by created_at
3. Given an event payload contains diff JSON, when rendered, then it renders a Collapsible 'Details' button revealing pretty JSON

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 RTL tests for parity, ordering, collapsible details
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test history-tab && pnpm --filter queries test list-fa-history'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow editing of history entries
- Do not bypass tenant RLS
- Do not include other FAs
